name: Galaxy Forces VR
short_description: Fly around in space caves with evil enemies, race or do pick up missions. All to the tunes of interactive music. 55 levels, online world records.
detailed_description:
A single player space shooter game. You are in control of a ship and the goal is to race against the clock to get the fastest time (race), or transport cargo to get the best score (mission). All done in a narrow space cave filled with evil enemies. Featuring interactive music, realistic physics and challenging game-play.

There are 55 levels and players may have their best score for each level sent to the game website and the top players are displayed there along with their ranking. The replay of the record scores are possible to view from the game for others to see how it was done. There are also 22 achievements to unlock.
